passed_checks.check_name: Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider
Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group specifies retention days
Ensure ECS Cluster enables logging of ECS Exec
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80
Ensure that ALB is configured with defensive or strictest desync mitigation mode
Ensure HTTP HTTPS Target group defines Healthcheck
code_block:
resource "aws_lb_target_group" "backend_tg" {
  name        = "tg-back-${var.environment_name}"
  port        = 8000
  protocol    = "HTTP"
  vpc_id      = var.vpc_id
  target_type = "ip"

  health_check {
    enabled             = true
    path                = "/health"
    port                = "8000"
    protocol            = "HTTP"
    healthy_threshold   = 2
    unhealthy_threshold = 2
    interval            = 15
    timeout             = 5
    matcher             = "200"
  }

  tags = {
    Environment = var.environment_name
  }
}

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure HTTP HTTPS Target group defines Healthcheck
code_block:
resource "aws_lb_target_group" "frontend_tg" {
  name        = "tg-front-${var.environment_name}"
  port        = 80
  protocol    = "HTTP"
  vpc_id      = var.vpc_id
  target_type = "ip"

  health_check {
    enabled             = true
    path                = "/"
    port                = "80"
    protocol            = "HTTP"
    healthy_threshold   = 2
    unhealthy_threshold = 2
    interval            = 15
    timeout             = 5
    matcher             = "200"
  }

  tags = {
    Environment = var.environment_name
  }
}

  name        = "tg-back-${var.environment_name}"
  port        = 8000
  protocol    = "HTTP"
  vpc_id      = var.vpc_id

  health_check {
    enabled             = true

    port                = "8000"

    unhealthy_threshold = 2
    interval            = 15
    timeout             = 5
    matcher             = "200"
  }

  tags = {
    Environment = var.environment_name
  }
}
